allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: collapsible response previews in debate mode with see more/less *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: hide error and blank responses from all output panels *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k: v[:10]+'...' if isinstance\(v,str\) and len\(v\)>10 else v for k,v in d.items\(\)}\)")
Bash(node -e "const { icons } = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = ['Presentation', 'Table', 'Music', 'File', 'FileText', 'FileType']; names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, !!icons[n]\)\);")
